title: Shib's Lemon Tea
description: Shib loves lemon tea, especially this brand called LTT (Lao Tir Tang). A popular drink within locals, this brand of lemon tea is a household name in Hong Kong. You'll see them in kiosks, supermarkets, and every other place that sells beverages. This brand prides itself on its secret recipe, which is ginger, an ungodly amount of molasses, and pure diabolicality from English teachers.
